paper_title: Sequencing and Phylogenetic Analysis of Trichomycterinae

methods.description: This method involves extracting DNA, amplifying the mitochondrial gene cytochrome b, sequencing the DNA, and performing phylogenetic analysis to understand evolutionary relationships.

steps.description: DNA samples were extracted and quantified using a NanoDrop ND-1000 spectrophotometer.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and quantify DNA samples using NanoDrop spectrophotometer

steps.description: In vitro amplification of the mitochondrial gene cytochrome b using primers CytbSiluF and CytbSiluR.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify cytochrome b gene using specific primers

steps.description: Amplicons were purified by adding 1 µL Exosap to each 10 µL of PCR product.
steps.searchable_summary: purify PCR amplicons using Exosap

steps.description: Sequencing reactions were performed using the Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Kit, following the manufacturer's protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: perform sequencing reactions using Big Dye Terminator Kit

steps.description: The 332 samples were sequenced in an ABI310 automatic sequencer.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence samples using ABI310 sequencer

steps.description: The sequences were aligned using Geneious v. 7.1.3.
steps.searchable_summary: align DNA sequences using Geneious

steps.description: The saturation test and concatenation of the sequences with identical haplotypes were performed in DAMBE5.
steps.searchable_summary: perform saturation test and concatenate sequences in DAMBE5

steps.description: The maximum likelihood (ML) tree was generated in MEGA version 7 with 1000 bootstrap replications.
steps.searchable_summary: generate ML tree using MEGA with bootstrap replications

steps.description: The Bayesian inference (BI) analysis was conducted in BEAST 2.5 with a relaxed lognormal model.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct BI analysis in BEAST with relaxed lognormal model

steps.description: ESS (>200) values were checked using Tracer v. 1.7.1.
steps.searchable_summary: check ESS values using Tracer

steps.description: The final trees were edited in FigTree v1.4.
steps.searchable_summary: edit phylogenetic trees in FigTree

steps.description: The intra-and intergroup distance percentages were calculated in MEGA version 7 using the Kimura-2-parameters model.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate distance percentages in MEGA using Kimura-2-parameters model

steps.description: The boxplot graphic was performed with R 4.2.1.
steps.searchable_summary: create boxplot graphic in R

methods.description: This method describes the collection and preparation of fish specimens for molecular and morphological analysis.

steps.description: Georeferenced 566 sequences, including 33 species of Trichomycterinae and 364 sequences of Trichomycterus sensu stricto.
steps.searchable_summary: georeference and collect sequences of fish species

steps.description: 182 specimens were collected by our team, and 142 were obtained from fish collections.
steps.searchable_summary: collect fish specimens from field and collections

steps.description: Specimen sampling procedures followed a standard protocol, mainly using trawl nets.
steps.searchable_summary: sample specimens using trawl nets following standard protocol

steps.description: Captured specimens were anesthetized by submersion in eugenol solution.
steps.searchable_summary: anesthetize specimens using eugenol solution

steps.description: Tissue samples of the right flank muscle were obtained from specimens fixed in 90% ethanol and preserved in absolute ethanol for molecular analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain and preserve tissue samples for molecular analysis

steps.description: For morphological comparisons, specimens were fixed in formalin for 15 days and then transferred to 70% ethanol.
steps.searchable_summary: fix specimens in formalin and transfer to ethanol for morphological analysis

steps.description: All specimens were registered in the fish collection at the Instituto Nacional da Mata Atlântica.
steps.searchable_summary: register specimens in fish collection database
